name: California Fig Coconut Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the figs until tender.
2. Remove stems and chop or grind the figs finely.
3. Grind or chop the shredded coconut and nut meats.
4. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix to form a paste, adding more lemon juice if needed.
5. Shape the mixture into small balls about 3/4 inch in diameter.
6. Roll each ball in finely chopped coconut.
